The supervisory authority shall assess compliance taking into account the following factors: (a) the nature, gravity, and duration of the infringement; (b) the intentional or negligent character of the infringement; (c) any relevant previous infringement by the controller. The authority shall give the controller an opportunity to be heard before issuing a decision.

Fines may be imposed in addition to, or instead of, measures referred to in this Article. The maximum fine shall not exceed twenty million euros.
